title: 用 AOTI 把 PyTorch 模型部署到 CUDA C++ runtime
summary: 纯 PyTorch 工具链把模型部署成 CUDA C++ 可加载 .pt2 包的完整流程:torch.export → torch._inductor.aoti_compile_and_package → C++ AOTIModelPackageLoader。 用一个同时含 native op(Linear / GELU)与 custom op(torch.library.custom_op)的玩具模型走通,每个阶段深入 torch 内部源码与对应 libtorch_*.so 路径。
title_en: Deploying a PyTorch Model to a CUDA C++ Runtime via AOT Inductor
summary_en: An end-to-end walkthrough of deploying a PyTorch model to a CUDA C++ runtime using only the PyTorch toolchain: torch.export → torch._inductor.aoti_compile_and_package → C++ AOTIModelPackageLoader. Worked through a toy model that mixes native ops (Linear, GELU) and a custom op (torch.library.custom_op), with each phase tracing into the relevant PyTorch source files and libtorch_*.so libraries.

title: LLM Attention 变体 Zoo: 可点击的家族树
summary: 按计算形式 × KV head 结构整理现代 LLM 的 attention 变体(dense softmax / sparse / linear / SSM / mLSTM 五大主支),每分支挂到具体模型与开源实现,另含正交件辅助树(QK-Norm、PE 变体、Gated Attention 等)。
title_en: LLM Attention Variant Zoo: A Clickable Family Tree
summary_en: A family-tree inventory of modern LLM attention variants, organised by computation form (dense softmax / sparse / linear / SSM / mLSTM) and KV-head structure, with concrete models and open-source implementations under each branch. Plus an orthogonal-building-blocks tree (QK-Norm, positional encoding variants, gated attention).

title: PyTorch 共享库结构: 源码目录 → .so → torch._C
summary: PyTorch CUDA wheel 里所有 .so 的源码目录映射与链接依赖,对照上游 CMake 考据 + 交互式 D3 图。 涉及 libtorch.so 为何是空 aggregator、libtorch_python.so 即 torch._C、libtorch_global_deps 的 RTLD_GLOBAL 预加载等关键机制。
title_en: PyTorch Shared Library Structure: Source Trees, .so Files, and torch._C
summary_en: How every .so in a CUDA PyTorch wheel maps to source-tree directories and links to one another, grounded in upstream CMake, with an interactive D3 dependency graph. Highlights why libtorch.so is empty, why libtorch_python.so is torch._C, and how libtorch_global_deps gets RTLD_GLOBAL-preloaded.

title: Hopper Cluster (CGA): DSMEM、集群 barrier 与 TMA 跨 CTA
summary: Hopper 引入的 Thread Block Cluster（CGA）把 GPC 内多个 CTA 绑成一组,从硬件上提供跨 CTA 的 smem 直连(DSMEM)、cluster scope barrier / mbarrier、以及 TMA 写到 shared::cluster 的能力。本篇梳理 cluster 的几何与硬件约束、cluster size 的编译期 vs 运行期指定方式、cudaLaunchKernelEx 完整 launch API、四个核心能力的语义,并给出 CUDA C++(带编译命令)和 CuTe DSL（Python）双版本的可运行例子。
title_en: Hopper Cluster (CGA): DSMEM, Cluster-scope Barriers and Cross-CTA TMA
summary_en: Hopper introduces Thread Block Clusters (CGA), grouping multiple CTAs on the same GPC into a unit with hardware-supported cross-CTA shared memory (DSMEM), cluster-scope barrier / mbarrier, and TMA stores into shared::cluster. The article covers cluster geometry and hardware constraints, compile-time vs runtime cluster size specification, the full cudaLaunchKernelEx launch API, the semantics of each capability, and runnable CUDA C++ examples (with compile commands) plus CuTe DSL (Python) counterparts.

title: Context Parallel 全景解析:从 RingAttention 到 MagiAttention
summary: 把长序列 LLM 训练中的 8 类 Context Parallel 方案(AllGather KV / RingAttention / Striped+Zigzag / Ulysses A2A / USP / LoongTrain Double-Ring / MagiAttention 等)放在统一通信+计算建模框架下解析:每个方案解决什么问题、什么时候失效、在 Megatron-LM/TransformerEngine 等开源代码里落在哪里,文末给一张全方法对比总表 + 选型决策树。
title_en: A Survey of Context Parallel Methods: From RingAttention to MagiAttention
summary_en: A unified communication-plus-compute analysis of 8 public Context Parallel methods for long-sequence LLM training (TE AllGather, RingAttention, Striped/Zigzag, DeepSpeed Ulysses, USP, LoongTrain Double-Ring, MagiAttention, and predecessors), each grounded in its open-source implementation and kill-switch. Ends with a side-by-side summary table and a method-selection decision tree.

title: PyTorch Dispatcher 全栈剖析:从 schema 到 CUDA kernel
summary: 从多维分派的需求出发,梳理 DispatchKey/BackendComponent 二维拆分、DispatchKeySet 优先级与 redispatch 机制;详解 schema 语法、native_functions.yaml 入口、TORCH_LIBRARY 全家桶宏;最后以 aten::add 在 CUDA 上的完整调用栈(Python → AutogradCUDA → CUDA → backward)串起 codegen、autograd 与 ufunc。
title_en: PyTorch Dispatcher Deep Dive: From Schema to CUDA Kernel
summary_en: A code-grounded walkthrough of PyTorch's dispatcher: multi-dimensional dispatch motivation, the DispatchKey / BackendComponent split, DispatchKeySet priority and redispatch, schema syntax and the TORCH_LIBRARY macro family, and a complete Python-to-CUDA trace of aten::add (forward and backward) tying together codegen, autograd and ufunc.

title: PyTorch C++↔Python 双向调度:TorchDispatchMode 与反向跳转
summary: dispatcher 那篇文章的姐妹篇 —— 从 Python DispatchKey 这一层钻进去,讲清 C++ 调用走到一半反向跳回 Python 的完整机制:PyInterpreterVTable + TensorImpl::pyobj_slot + PythonFallbackKernel + TorchDispatchMode API。配合 FakeTensorMode / make_fx + ProxyTorchDispatchMode / DTensor 三个真实用户案例,以及它在 torch.compile 流水线中的角色。
title_en: PyTorch C++↔Python Bidirectional Dispatch: TorchDispatchMode and the Reverse Jump
summary_en: Sister article to the dispatcher deep dive. Zooms into the Python DispatchKey: how a C++ op call mid-flight reverse-jumps back into Python via PyInterpreterVTable, TensorImpl::pyobj_slot, PythonFallbackKernel, and the TorchDispatchMode protocol. Includes worked case studies on FakeTensorMode, make_fx + ProxyTorchDispatchMode, DTensor, and the mechanism's role in torch.compile's AOTAutograd pipeline.

title: oneTrans+YaMBDA study
summary: Yambda 数据集与 OneTrans 数据流梳理：原始 parquet schema、sparse/sequential/dense/cross-product 训练特征清单、embedding 表总览、ScoringPair 字段索引、DataLoader 运行时派生与 candidate 生成,并配 B=2 batch 张量流示例。
summary_en: A study of the Yambda dataset and OneTrans data pipeline: parquet schema, sparse / sequential / dense / cross-product feature inventory, embedding-table summary, ScoringPair indexing, DataLoader runtime derivations, candidate generation, and a B=2 batch tensor flow.

title: Python Import 机制：绝对导入 vs 相对导入
summary: 从 module / package / __init__.py / namespace package 等基础概念入手,梳理 sys.path、__name__、__package__ 在 import 解析中的角色,配合 4 个典型例子与 6 个常见报错,讲清绝对导入 vs 相对导入的选型边界。
title_en: Python Import Mechanism: Absolute vs Relative
summary_en: Notes on Python's import system: module / package / __init__.py / namespace-package basics; the role of sys.path, __name__, and __package__ in resolution; 4 worked examples and 6 common error cases; plus a checklist for choosing between absolute and relative imports.

title: GEMM 计算/访存比分析
summary: 从方阵基线到任意形状 tile,再到 2 级 blocking 与跨 tile 复用,完整推导 arithmetic intensity；并讨论 Split-K / Stream-K / Persistent / Cluster 等调度算法,以及 Kt、L2 cache 在实战中的选型经验。
summary_en: From a square-matrix baseline through arbitrary tile shapes to 2-level blocking with cross-tile reuse, a full derivation of arithmetic intensity. Covers Split-K / Stream-K / Persistent / Cluster scheduling and practical Kt and L2-cache sizing tradeoffs.
